subcodes.first_line: The Pen proclaimeth unto all nations: The Ancient Lord hath come! Sovereignty belongeth unto God, the All-Powerful, the All-Choosing. The Bird doth warble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی القلم کل الامم قد اتی مالک القدم الملک لله المقتدر المختار تغرد طیر
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world
